page_metadata.biotools__summary: CyanoMapDB is a database providing cyanobacterial protein-protein interactions (PPIs) with experimental evidence, consisting of 52,304 PPIs among 6,789 proteins from 23 cyanobacterial species.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: CyanoMapDB is a database providing cyanobacterial protein-protein interactions (PPIs) with experimental evidence, consisting of 52,304 PPIs among 6,789 proteins from 23 cyanobacterial species.
